ddls:
CREATE TABLE "card_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the card set */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport associated with the card set */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the card set was released */,
  "total_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of cards in the set */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the company that produced the card set */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the card set */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the card set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set the card belongs to */,
  "card_number" INTEGER /* Card number within the set */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player featured on the card */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team associated with the card */,
  "sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the card */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the card */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the card */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Professional grade of the card */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for limited edition cards */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the card image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES card_sets ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_team_name FOREIGN KEY ("team_name") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_player_name FOREIGN KEY ("player_name") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in their sport */,
  "career_stats" TEXT /* Career statistics of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team is part of */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's current coach or manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., collector, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating based on past transactions */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the collection was created */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the collection */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the collection */,
  "featured_image_url" TEXT /* URL to a featured image of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_cards" (
  "collection_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card in a collection */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection the card belongs to */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the collection */,
  "acquired_date" TEXT /* Date the card was acquired */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card */,
  "price_paid" REAL /* Price paid for the card */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the card in the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_cards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collection_cards_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user selling the card */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user buying the card */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the card was sold */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the transaction */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipped card */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "rating_given_by_seller" INTEGER /* Rating given by the seller to the buyer */,
  "rating_given_by_buyer" INTEGER /* Rating given by the buyer to the seller */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments from the buyer or seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the card in the market */,
  "highest_price" REAL /* Highest price of the card in the market */,
  "lowest_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the card in the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the market data was last updated */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of transactions for the card in the last 30 days */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Market trend */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)
